title: Carbasa
description: A mod that adds a gallery of new paintings inspired by Kristoffer Zetterstrand's pieces.
body:
![A point Minecraft purple/pink painting with 'Carbasa' written on the painting.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f5f3211d4092e45e246893ff469cb1c8452094d.png)

### Ever felt like there's not enough paintings that we could've had?

**Carbasa** is a mod that adds a gallery of new paintings inspired by Kristoffer Zetterstrand's pieces.

Painted with the purpose of fitting in any kinds of builds and scenarios!
